description: Create a funnel chart visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop to analyze revenue distribution by customer segment using the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'. The visualization must use 'Customer Segment' for the category and 'Sales' for the values, sorted in descending order with data labels enabled. Set the visualization title to 'Revenue by Customer Segment' and save the workbook as 'SegmentFunnel' to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SegmentFunnel.dva'.
